session_15_summary: Session 15 (started 2026-06-05, ran past midnight into 2026-06-06). Workplace machine — no semantix, native tools + file memory. Start HEAD f4d225b, final HEAD eb3eb47, 6 commits, all pushed, tree clean. THEME: solved the two-lane / מנהטן far-lane problem end to end (see memory/slpr_lane_filtering.md). The parking entrance has 2 lanes; only the near one is ours (building בוטיק), the far lane is the neighbour lot (מנהטן). The outdoor gate camera (CAM_ID 1) sees BOTH lanes so far-lane cars were logged as if they entered; the original programmer's fix was a useless black rectangle masked into the cam-1 image. THE KEY INSIGHT: camera 3 ('Entry1') is mounted INSIDE our ramp — a car only appears there once it has actually driven down into our garage, so any cam-3 history => ours. Validated against live data (far-lane regular 74596903: 81 reads, 100% cam1, 0 cam3 ever; registered regulars are cam3-dominant ~2:1) and by pulling live camera images. COMMITS: (1) 3db59c6 feat: lane split — getPlateVisitStats tallies SUM(CAM_ID=3); SlprCarEventRow.building 'boutique'|'manhattan'; notifier (getLatestCarEvent) gated to cam3; CarsTab green בוטיק/rose מנהטן tag column + faded Manhattan rows + tag in details aside. Also stripped the leftover NewCarNotifier TEMP DEBUG block (TEST_SAMPLES + floating test button + pushTest) that was sitting uncommitted from session 14, and shipped the redesigned arrival toast (brand-red gradient header, mono text-xl plate, header-mounted sound/close, clickable body). (2) 265713d feat: cars feed defaults to בוטיק-only with a 'רק בוטיק' toggle (Building2 icon next to רענון) that reveals מנהטן + the building column; filtering re-bases pagination/selection/details, resets to page 1. (3) e08c41a fix(whatsapp): dedupe resident phone numbers in the chat dropdown — toPhoneDropdownOptions now Set-dedupes by trimmed number (a resident with the same number stored twice produced two DropdownOptions with the same value => React duplicate-key crash + ambiguous selection). (4) 0dd6f05 fix: REVERTED the notifier's cam-3 gate back to CAM_ID=1. Moti tested live and got no notification for a passing car — diagnosed it as the intended ~30s cam3 latency (alert fires only after the car is already inside), which is too late for a lobby 'car arriving' heads-up. He chose instant-on-everything (old behaviour). getLastCarPlate stayed on cam1 throughout. (5) eb3eb47 perf: the cars feed was 'slow and jumpy' — root-caused to getPlateVisitStats recomputing LIFETIME stats for all ~770 on-screen plates (3-day window) on every 10s refresh, a ~1.7s near-full scan of the 65k-row log, when only 10 rows are ever shown (a one-page IN-list is 14-110ms). Added an in-memory per-plate cache (TTL 5 min) keyed by plate; only uncached/expired plates hit the DB. Measured getRecentCarEvents 1736ms cold -> ~35ms warm (~50x), Moti verified 'works great'. Trade-off: building tag/visit count can be up to 5 min stale (fine for lobby; the instant gate notifier is the live signal). The fully-fresh alternative is server-side pagination (deferred, bigger CarsTab+action refactor). FORENSIC NOTE: Moti flagged taxi 4559226 as having 'sneaked in' (far-lane car tagged בוטיק) — investigation proved it was CORRECT: the cam3 image showed the same taxi actually driving down our ramp (it sat in the far lane, then pulled in). Classification is lifetime cam3 presence, so a car that ever legitimately entered reads בוטיק on all appearances. All probes were throwaway npx tsx scripts using the node_modules/server-only shim trick, deleted after (incl. a stray-file cleanup from a broken bash echo on the first shim attempt). Every change typechecked clean before commit. Commit messages written via .git/COMMIT_MSG_TMP.txt + git commit -F per the usual convention.
session_13_summary: Session 13 wrapped 2026-06-05 (spanned midnight from 2026-06-04). Workplace machine — semantix tools NOT installed (native tools + file memory). Started HEAD 51dbda0, ended HEAD adb77f1, 3 feature commits, all pushed, tree clean. THEME: building on session 12's guest-recognition arc + a deep read-only research dive into the external SLPR parking MySQL. (1) KNOWN-GUESTS TAB (95ce453): new אורחים מוכרים tab in /events next to רכבים. getKnownGuestsPage(page,pageSize) + searchKnownGuests(query) added to cars-actions.ts (paginated 10/page, ordered by updated_at DESC, joins residents+apartments via rg.resident_id/apartment_id). New src/components/events/KnownGuestsTab.tsx — searchable+paginated table (plate/name/apartment/host-resident/learned-date/forget), reuses Pagination + DeleteEventButton(forgetResidentGuest) + useDebouncedValue. Forget is open to all (matches cars-tab forget control, NOT manager-gated). Wired into EventsView TABS. (2) SLPR DB RESEARCH (no code shipped, throwaway scripts deleted): mapped all 33 tables of the SLPR parking DB. KEY FACTS: cameras = ID1 'Entry'(IN,ON), ID3 'Entry1'(IN,ON), ID2 'Exit'(OUT,OFF) — BOTH live cams are ENTRY, exit cam is OFF → CANNOT compute exits or 'who's currently inside' or reliable live occupancy. log (64,782 rows, live) is the star: ~53% INVALID / 47% VALID, clear hourly curve (peak 15-16h), Saturday dip (Shabbat), ~800-985 reads/day, double-reads cam1+cam3 within ~30s for same car. customer (376 cars): 160 employees / 216 residents, 370 with apartment; CarColor/CarType/isVIP/inside all empty or stale-default (skip). overflowhistory (283k rows) LOOKS like occupancy gold but counter is BROKEN/saturated (occupiedSpots pinned 368, exit cam off so never decrements); guest-group series died Aug 2025. parkinglotoccupancyhistory/updatehistory stale (end Dec 2024). NO per-spot/coordinate data anywhere — it's a plate-at-gate system; CarSpaceNumber is manual free-text ownership notes filled for only 6/376. ANSWERED Moti: can't know car positions, can't know which/how-many spots taken. (3) REGISTERED-CARS SETTINGS TAB (ecb2bd2): new רכבים רשומים tab in /settings (settings is already manager-only via page redirect). src/app/settings/registered-cars-actions.ts — READ-ONLY SLPR customer queries: getRegisteredCarsSummary() + getRegisteredCarsPage(page,size,query). CRITICAL: querySlpr takes RAW SQL (no bound params!) — added sqlString() escaper (escape backslash+quote, cap 60 chars) for the search term. src/components/settings/RegisteredCarsTab.tsx — composition donut (Recharts PieChart, residents vs employees, total in center) + searchable paginated table (plate/name/apartment/phone/type badge, additional_lps under plate), graceful error banner on SLPR connection failure. Wired into SettingsView. (4) CARS-TAB OWNER FALLBACK (adb77f1): the אורח מזוהה column in רכבים now falls back to the customer table when a plate isn't a learned guest — getRecentCarEvents now LEFT JOINs customer ON c.ID=l.Customer_Id AND l.Customer_Id>0 (SAME-DB join, allowed; the never-SQL-join rule is only SLPR<->local-SQLite). New RegisteredOwner type + toRegisteredOwner helper + registeredOwner field on SlprCarEventRow. UI: learned guest (green) keeps priority, else registered owner shown in SKY-BLUE with 'רכב רשום' label + apartment, else dash. Same sky block added to CarDetails aside. Every change typechecked clean before commit. GOTCHA HIT TWICE: used PowerShell here-string (@'...'@) syntax in the Bash tool by mistake on the first commit — leaked a stray '@' into the message; fixed via amend before push. SWITCHED to writing commit messages to .git/COMMIT_MSG_TMP.txt + git commit -F for all subsequent commits. Reusable trick this session: to run slpr-mysql.ts outside Next (npx tsx), create a no-op node_modules/server-only shim (gitignored), delete after. (5) PER-PLATE VISIT COUNT (9e8ba13, added after the wrap when Moti had an insight): for the educated-guess decision on UNREGISTERED plates, show how many times a car has been in the lot. New PlateVisitStats type + getPlateVisitStats() in cars-actions.ts — one grouped query SELECT LP, COUNT(DISTINCT FLOOR(UNIX_TIMESTAMP(LOG_DATE)/120)) AS visits, MIN/MAX(LOG_DATE) over the plates on screen. CRITICAL DEDUP: the twin entry cams (1 & 3) fire for the same car within ~30s, so raw COUNT(*) would ~double the real visits — bucket reads into 2-min windows. getRecentCarEvents now also awaits getPlateVisitStats and attaches visitStats. CarsTab: compact badge under the plate ('{N} כניסות' muted, 'כניסה ראשונה' in amber for first-timers, tooltip), plus a היסטוריית כניסות panel block (total / first-seen / last-seen via formatEventTime). DESIGN: informational, NEVER a verdict — no red/danger styling; amber only flags novelty. Moti's boss saw it live and was thrilled. Adds 1 extra SLPR query per 10s refresh (log.LP is indexed, cheap). Final HEAD 9e8ba13 (+ this bookkeeping commit on top).
session_9_summary: Session 9 (2026-05-23). Search added to keys history (by key nickname or apartment number) and packages history (by resident name, apartment number, or recipient name) — both follow the same debounced search / paginated fallback pattern as VehiclesTab. New 'בעלי דירות' section built from scratch: apartment_owners table (id, first_name, last_name, apartment_id FK SET NULL, comments, created_at) + owners_mobiles table (id, owner_id FK CASCADE, phone, comment, created_at). Sidebar entry added with Crown icon. /owners page: list with search (client-side filter by name or apt number), add owner modal (name + apt dropdown + phones inline + comments textarea), edit owner modal (same fields pre-filled), add phone inline per owner, delete phone per owner (manager-only for write ops). layout.tsx script tag fixed with suppressHydrationWarning for React 19 compatibility.
session_11_in_progress: Session 11 started 2026-05-31. Opened with greeting; Moti to set the agenda. Carry-over still open: WhatsApp logout-hang fix (5+ deferrals coming), bootstrap manager auto-promote (still un-done), inbound WhatsApp smoke-test, auto-triggered WhatsApp sends. Untracked working-tree files from previous sessions include: src/app/owners/*, src/components/owners/*, src/app/events/cars-actions.ts, src/components/events/CarsTab.tsx, src/app/api/slpr/image/route.ts, src/lib/slpr-mysql.ts, tests/cars_db/*. Note: SLPR (license-plate?) integration files appeared since last session — not yet documented.
session_12_summary: Session 12 wrapped 2026-06-04. THE BIG WIN: committed the entire ~4-session uncommitted backlog (was floating in the working tree since session 9) and shipped a complete guest-recognition feature arc. Workplace machine — semantix tools NOT installed (used native Grep/Glob/Read + file memory). Git on this machine IS connected to origin (github.com/MotiTheWizerd/raam-manage) and creds work — Moti had wrongly assumed it wasn't. (1) BACKLOG SPLIT: reset the index and split the whole tree into 6 focused commits ordered schema-first: feat(db) owners+equipment+guest-comment schema (9e0cabc) -> feat(owners) directory (d3a1244) -> feat(events) equipment loans (3774590) -> feat(events) SLPR cars tab + guest plate autofill (8a2b87f, which ALSO carried this session's first task: a per-row 'register guest' UserRoundPlus button in CarsTab that jumps to the ניהול אורחים tab with the row's plate prefilled, threaded CarsTab->EventsView->VehiclesTab->GuestParkingSection via a {plate,nonce} prefill object; nonce makes repeat clicks of the same plate re-fire) -> chore: dashboard/UI tweaks + bookkeeping (a86a640) -> chore(tooling): .claude commands + docs (05be790). Note .claude/settings.local.json is gitignored — correctly NOT committed. (2) RESIDENT-GUEST RECOGNITION (dc657ea): new resident_guests table (plate_key TEXT UNIQUE, car_plate, guest_name, resident_id SET NULL, apartment_id SET NULL, created_at, updated_at). SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_VERSION bumped 3->4 (table added to BOTH the SCHEMA const and the applySchemaEvolution db.exec block per the existing pattern so running dev servers pick it up without restart). New src/lib/plate.ts normalizePlate() = strip non-[0-9A-Z], uppercase. createGuestParking now calls rememberResidentGuest() -> INSERT OR IGNORE keyed by plate_key (first-seen wins, 'do nothing if present' per Moti; best-effort try/catch so it never breaks a guest registration; derives apartment_id from residents). getRecentCarEvents enriches each SLPR row via matchKnownGuests() — an APPLICATION-LEVEL join (cannot SQL-join the external SLPR MySQL to local SQLite): collect plate keys, one IN(...) query against resident_guests joined to residents/apartments, build a Map, attach row.guest. CarsTab shows a green 'אורח מזוהה' column + a green highlight block in the CarDetails aside. (3) TABLE CLEANUP (same commit dc657ea): removed מצלמה + לקוח columns from the cars table (still shown in the details aside); date switched to compact DD/MM HH:MM via formatEventTime() with the full timestamp on the cell title (hover). (4) NAME PREFILL (300baa4): clicking a known car's register-guest icon now also prefills the guest NAME (not just plate) and lands focus on the name field; prefill object extended to {plate,guestName,nonce}; resident stays as the selected one (deliberately NOT auto-reassigned to the known guest's resident). (5) FORGET GUEST (51dbda0): the green recognized-guest card in the CarDetails aside got a trash button reusing DeleteEventButton + ConfirmDialog -> new forgetResidentGuest server action deletes from resident_guests by id (RecognizedGuest gained an id field) and reloads the list; only forgets the recognition memory, guest_parking history untouched, plate re-learnable later. All 9 commits pushed to origin/main (final HEAD 51dbda0). Working tree clean. Every change typechecked clean (npx tsc --noEmit) before commit. Moti delighted — called it senior-dev work.
session_8_summary: Session 8 wrapped 2026-05-14 (FOURTH session same calendar day — Sessions 5/6/7/8 all 2026-05-14). Full chart-based dashboard rebuild at '/'. Recharts (3.x, MIT, ~95KB gz) installed and is now the chart lib of record — beat Visx/Tremor/ECharts/Chart.js/Nivo for fit with 'keep simple' rule + Tailwind v4 + brand-red identity. New src/lib/dashboard-queries.ts holds all 7 query helpers (getPackagesWaiting, getKeysInLobby, getGuestCarsToday, getActivityTimeline, getWhatsAppVolume, getSystemMessages, getSuggestions) — each returns a typed shape; SQLite localtime-aware via date(created_at,'localtime'); 7-day series zero-filled in JS using lastNDays() helper. New src/components/dashboard/ChartCard.tsx is the shared shell — 5 accent colors (red/blue/amber/emerald/violet), framer-motion fade-in with staggered delay prop, flex-row-reverse header (number on right, title on left — RTL fix applied after first visual review showed flex was rendering LTR-ordered despite html dir=rtl). 7 tile components co-located in src/components/dashboard/: PackagesWaitingTile (BarChart, in/out 7d), KeysInLobbyTile (count + faded KeyRound icon — original apt-number badges were stripped after Moti flagged 100+ would be noise), GuestCarsTodayTile (count + faded CarFront icon), ActivityTimelineTile (AreaChart, 24h x-axis, 3 series keys/packages/guests with linearGradient fills), WhatsAppVolumeTile (LineChart sent/received 7d), SystemMessagesTile (horizontal Bar by priority, mirror Y-axis), SuggestionsTile (horizontal Bar by status, mirror Y-axis). All time-series charts use reversed XAxis so time flows R→L for Hebrew reading; YAxis orientation=right; horizontal-bar charts use mirror=true on YAxis so category labels overlay the bar's start edge (eliminating the 50-56px padding gap Moti caught). ResponsiveContainer uses width=100% + explicit pixel height (140/150/210) instead of percent-height to dodge recharts 'width(-1) height(-1)' warnings from flex-1 min-h-0 wrappers. src/app/page.tsx rewritten — drops the old 3-stat block, composes 7 tiles in 3 rows (3/2/2) with staggered framer-motion delays (0, 0.05, 0.1, 0.15, 0.2, 0.25, 0.3s). Dashboard audience decided up front: LOBBY STAFF (operational), not Moti's management view. System messages + suggestions tiles shown to everyone informationally per Moti's decision. WhatsApp logout-hang fix DEFERRED A FOURTH TIME so Session 8 stays scope-tight on charts.
session_summary: Session 7 wrapped 2026-05-14 (third session same calendar day — Sessions 5/6/7 all 2026-05-14). WhatsApp moved from 'spike with autofill' to a real chat UI. New whatsapp_messages table (id, resident_id FK SET NULL, phone, direction in|out, body, status pending|sent|delivered|read|failed, wa_message_id for receipt correlation, error, created_at/updated_at) with 3 indexes (phone+created_at, resident_id+created_at, wa_message_id). Runtime (src/lib/whatsapp-test.ts) extended: sendText persists pending row → flips to 'sent' on success (storing the Baileys wa_message_id) or 'failed' + error on throw; new messages.upsert listener records inbound rows, matches resident_id by last-9-digit phone compare; new messages.update listener flips status forward (pending→sent→delivered→read) with a guard that never downgrades from 'read' or 'failed'. extractText helper unwraps ephemeralMessage / viewOnceMessage(V2) and picks up image/video captions. Diagnostic console.logs were added to the upsert listener (logs envelope keys + recordInboundMessage outcome) — LEFT IN PLACE so Moti can debug inbound when he gets a second phone in a few hours. Page redesigned as chat layout: ConversationSidebar on the RTL-start side (w-64, border-e) listing one row per phone with last-message preview + apartment number + time + 'אתה: ' prefix for outbound; ChatPanel with phone-editable header chip, RTL-correct message bubbles (out=justify-end=visually-left in RTL, matches WhatsApp Hebrew), lucide status ticks (Clock/Check/CheckCheck/CheckCheck-sky for read/X for failed), auto-scroll-on-new. Composer wrapped textarea + send button in a single bordered container with focus-within ring; send button is ghost variant with brand-red icon, flipped via -scale-x-100 so the paper-airplane points forward in RTL. Polling tick now fetches status + active-conversation messages + conversation list every 2s using refs for active phone/residentId so the interval never re-creates on keystrokes. New server actions in src/app/test/whatsapp/actions.ts: getWhatsAppMessages({residentId, phone}) (OR-merges both filters when both present) and getWhatsAppConversations() (CTE last-per-phone joined to residents/apartments/zones returning the SelectedResident shape so a side-panel click can update the global selectedResident store). Layout container widened from max-w-3xl to max-w-5xl to fit sidebar + chat. Known runtime gotchas surfaced this session: (1) globalThis-cached singletons (db handle AND WhatsApp runtime) survive Turbopack HMR — must fully restart `next dev` after schema/runtime edits. (2) Stale Baileys creds bit again — manual `rm -rf .baileys-auth/test-whatsapp` unblock required. BUG 1 + BUG 2 (logout-hang) still NOT FIXED — deferred deliberately a second time per Moti's call to keep scope tight. Inbound flow could not be tested this session (no second phone) — Moti will smoke-test later today; outbound persistence + chat UI + sidebar list confirmed working visually.

stack.global_state: zustand (vanilla store + Context provider, SSR-seeded from server)
stack.runtime_target: lobby PC, localhost only — not a server deployment
stack.import_tooling: xlsx + npx tsx for one-shot scripts under scripts/
stack.whatsapp_deps: baileys + qrcode — drives the chat-style WhatsApp page at /test/whatsapp + /api/test/whatsapp/* (still sidebar-visible to all lobbyists). Outbound persisted with status tracking; inbound listener wired but not test-driven yet.

tables: apartments (id, number UNIQUE, floor, zone_id FK, notes, created_at, updated_at)
residents (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, first_name, last_name, id_number, po_box, type owner|renter, move_in, move_out, notes, created_at, updated_at)
phones (id, resident_id FK CASCADE, number, label, comment, is_primary)
apartment_assets (id, type parking|storage, floor, number, apartment_id FK SET NULL, notes; UNIQUE(type, floor, number))
apartment_keys (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, nickname, is_default, is_active, is_in_lobby, created_at)
apartment_keys_history (id, apartment_key_id FK CASCADE, is_in_lobby, resident_id FK SET NULL, lobbyist_name, comment NULLABLE, created_at)
apartment_vehicles (id, apartment_id FK CASCADE, license_plate, color, model, notes, created_at)
guest_parking (id, resident_id FK CASCADE, car_plate, guest_name, lobbyist_name, created_at) — car_plate may be empty string now (column still NOT NULL)
packages (id, resident_id FK SET NULL, recipient_name NULLABLE, type package|envelope|laundry, direction in|out, delivered_by, received_by, is_delivered, comment, created_at, delivered_at)
users (id, lobbyist_name, is_active, created_at, password TEXT, user_role TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'lobbyist')
user_preferences (id=1, data JSON blob, updated_at) — single-row prefs
system_messages (id, title, body, start_at, end_at, priority low|med|high, created_at)
suggestions (id, category bug|improvement|idea, status open|in_progress|done|wont_fix, title, body, submitter_name, resolution_note, created_at, updated_at)

whatsapp_messages (id, resident_id FK SET NULL, phone TEXT NOT NULL, direction in|out, body TEXT, status pending|sent|delivered|read|failed, wa_message_id TEXT NULL for receipt correlation, error TEXT NULL, created_at, updated_at) — added Session 7. 3 indexes: phone+created_at, resident_id+created_at, wa_message_id
apartment_owners (id, first_name, last_name, apartment_id FK SET NULL, comments, created_at) + owners_mobiles (id, owner_id FK CASCADE, phone, comment, created_at) — Session 9, committed Session 12

equipment_loans (id, resident_id FK SET NULL, borrower_name, type chairs|tables, quantity>0, lobbyist_name, is_returned, returned_at, comment, created_at) — committed Session 12. 2 indexes: resident, open(WHERE is_returned=0)

resident_guests (id, plate_key TEXT UNIQUE, car_plate, guest_name, resident_id FK SET NULL, apartment_id FK SET NULL, created_at, updated_at) — Session 12. Plate-keyed guest memory: learn-on-create (INSERT OR IGNORE), recognize-on-display in רכבים tab via APP-LEVEL join (external SLPR MySQL cannot be SQL-joined to local SQLite). SCHEMA_EVOLUTION_VERSION is now 4.
schema.evolution_helper: src/lib/db.ts ensureColumn() + a one-shot UPDATE seeds: existing users get password='1234' WHERE password IS NULL on every db open (idempotent). user_role defaults to 'lobbyist' for new rows. NOTE: schema-add-on-running-dev-server requires full `next dev` restart — globalThis.__raamDb caches the connection.
schema.datetime_local_storage: system_messages.start_at and end_at store browser <input type="datetime-local"> wall-clock format (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM); active query uses strftime('%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M', 'now', 'localtime') so comparisons stay in local time. whatsapp_messages.created_at uses SQLite CURRENT_TIMESTAMP which is UTC — the page's formatTime() helper treats them as UTC and renders in local time (he-IL locale).
schema.phone_match_strategy: WhatsApp inbound listener resolves resident by querying SELECT resident_id, number FROM phones, normalizing each via digitsOnly() and matching on the LAST 9 DIGITS. Robust to 972/+972/0xx prefixes. JS-side match, not SQL — runs once per inbound message, ~250 rows, trivial.

auth_system.model: Plain-text passwords stored in users.password. No encryption per user spec (lobby PC, localhost — anti-misclick, not anti-attacker).
auth_system.session_cookie: raam_session — httpOnly, sameSite='lax', no maxAge (dies on browser close). Holds the user id as plain string, no JWT/encryption.
auth_system.server_helpers: src/lib/auth.ts — getCurrentUser() (cached via React cache, reads cookie → DB), setSessionCookie(id), clearSessionCookie(), isManager() (returns boolean). UserRole = 'lobbyist' | 'manager'.
auth_system.proxy_gate: src/proxy.ts (Next 16 proxy, formerly middleware) — no cookie + non-/login → redirect /login; cookie + /login → redirect /. Optimistic check, no DB hit. Matcher excludes /api, _next/*, common static assets.
auth_system.client_context: src/components/AuthProvider.tsx — exposes useCurrentUser() and useIsManager(). Layout passes the resolved user from getCurrentUser(); when null, layout renders bare body (login page paints itself); when truthy, full chrome (Header + Sidebar + StickyMessages).
auth_system.login_flow: /login → kiosk grid (LoginPicker) shows active users by name + role badge → click name → modal with masked password input → submit → server action verifies + sets cookie + redirects /. Logout = form action that clears cookie and redirects to /login.
auth_system.bootstrap_gotcha: user_role defaults to 'lobbyist' for ALL existing rows when the column is added. Bootstrap fix (auto-promote lowest-id active user when no manager exists) is STILL on the carry-over list — has bit dev (Session 5) and prod (Session 6); promoted-to-top each session and still un-done.
auth_system.no_per_action_auth: Server actions don't re-check the cookie — proxy gate is the line of defense. Acceptable per threat model; would be inadequate for a public deployment.

role_gating.lobbyist: Default role. Can: log keys/packages/guest-parking events, view residents/apartments/zones/system-messages, search, submit suggestions, access the WhatsApp page (Session 6 — managerOnly flag dropped). Cannot: delete events (trash icon hidden), edit anything in apartments/residents/zones (form wrapped in <fieldset disabled>), change suggestion status, add/edit system messages, access /users at all.
role_gating.manager: Full access. Sees everything lobbyist sees + edit/delete surfaces + the /users management page.
role_gating.implementation_pattern: Two flavours: server pages compute `const canEdit = await isManager()` and conditionally render Add/Edit/Delete buttons. Client components call useIsManager() and either return null (action buttons) or wrap forms in <fieldset disabled={!isManager}>. Sidebar filters out managerOnly items (currently only /users).

primitives: src/components/ui/Input.tsx — exports inputBase; prevents Enter from submitting unless submitOnEnter prop; forwardRef'd
src/components/ui/Field.tsx — label + child + required asterisk + optional hint
src/components/ui/Dropdown.tsx — custom button + portal panel, framer-motion, brand-red highlight, keyboard nav; controlled or uncontrolled
src/components/ui/Tabs.tsx — sliding red underline via framer-motion layoutId; supports optional badge prop per tab
src/components/ui/ConfirmDialog.tsx — reusable destructive-confirm built on Modal
shells_and_session: src/components/Modal.tsx — portal, AnimatePresence, backdrop blur, scale-in, ESC/click-outside, sm|md|lg
src/components/Header.tsx — logo + SearchBar + CurrentUserChip + ThemeToggle. Takes lobbyistName prop from layout.
src/components/CurrentUserChip.tsx — server component with name + logout form action
src/components/AuthProvider.tsx — client context exposing useCurrentUser() / useIsManager()
src/components/Sidebar.tsx — nav items support managerOnly flag; useIsManager() filters. Items: כללי, אירועים, דירות, דיירים, פקידים (mgr-only), ווטסאפ (open to all), הגדרות.
src/components/SearchBar.tsx — global resident search (debounced, race-safe, auto-focus on chip clear)
src/components/SelectedResidentChip.tsx — replaces SearchBar input when a resident is in store
src/components/StickyMessages.tsx — fixed cards on the left edge
src/components/PreferencesProvider.tsx — Zustand store; activeLobbyist seeded from server-resolved currentUser. Debounced auto-save (300ms) for sidebar.collapsed + selectedResident.
src/components/events/DeleteEventButton.tsx — generic icon-trash + ConfirmDialog. Conditionally rendered via useIsManager().
design_system.list_patterns: Renters list + Apartments list both use a SortHeader subcomponent (duplicated, not extracted — only 2 consumers). Sort uses localeCompare locale='he' numeric:true so Hebrew names + alphanumeric apt numbers collate correctly. Nulls sink to bottom. Renters name-sort is first_name-first (Session 6). Renters has Dropdown filter (all/owners/renters); Users page has all/active/inactive (default active).

preferences_shape.selectedResident: SelectedResident | null — search-bar selection, persisted. Now ALSO settable by clicking a ConversationSidebar row on the WhatsApp page (Session 7).

screen_pattern_now: Detail pages render the form directly (always-edit). For lobbyists, the entire form is wrapped in <fieldset disabled> so it stays readable but inert. Heading flips between 'עריכת X' (manager) and 'פרטי X' (lobbyist). See ApartmentDetail and ResidentDetail.
events_page_architecture: /events is a single page that reads selectedResident from the Zustand store. Three tabs: ניהול מפתחות, ניהול חבילות, ניהול אורחים. With a resident selected → action surfaces (add modal, mark-delivered, log key event); without → global recent-history feeds. Lobbyist name auto-fills from session. All event types have row-level delete via DeleteEventButton — trash icon hidden for lobbyists. Vehicles/guest tab has server-side search (searchGuestParking action, LIKE on guest_name OR car_plate). car_plate is optional.
global_state_pattern: PreferencesProvider creates a Zustand vanilla store + Context once on mount, seeded from server-fetched prefs in layout.tsx + server-resolved currentUser. Subscribe callback debounce-saves any change at 300ms via savePreferences server action. AuthProvider is a parallel context for the resolved currentUser (used by useIsManager).
form_pipeline: useActionState + a *FormState type with { error, errorAt, submittedAt }. fail() helper sets errorAt = Date.now() so consecutive identical errors still re-toast. useFormToasts(state) hook fires sonner toasts. Modals close via Promise.resolve().then(() => setOpen(false)) (React 19 set-state-in-effect rule). Settings tabs use a client-side broadcast event pattern (system-messages-events, suggestions-events, zones-events) so AddX/EditX buttons can notify the list to refetch.
next_16_quirk_logged: revalidatePath() inside a server action under Next 16 + Turbopack can trap the action response, leaving useActionState's submittedAt unpropagated and any modal that closes on success frozen. If you have a client-side broadcast handling refresh, prefer dropping revalidatePath there. Also: Next 16 renamed middleware → proxy.ts; cookies() is now async (await cookies()). NEW IN SESSION 7: globalThis-cached singletons (db handle in db.ts, WhatsApp runtime in whatsapp-test.ts) survive Turbopack HMR — schema/runtime edits require a FULL `next dev` restart, not just a file-save.

routes./: Dashboard — live counts (apartments, active residents, zones). PLANNED SESSION 8: full chart-based rebuild (recharts the working pick).
routes./login: Public — kiosk picker + password modal. Not gated by proxy; hard-redirects to / if cookie present.
routes./apartments: List + add modal (manager-only add). Sortable headers.
routes./apartments/[id]: Form (manager: editable; lobbyist: <fieldset disabled>, heading 'פרטי דירה')
routes./renters: List + add modal (manager-only add). Type filter (all/owners/renters) + sortable headers. Name sort first_name-first.
routes./renters/[id]: Form (same lobbyist disabled pattern as apartments)
routes./events: Tabs (keys, packages, אורחים); reads selectedResident from prefs store. Lobbyists can log + view but not delete events.
routes./users: Manager-only (server redirect lobbyists to /). Inline password reset column (visible text for managers, masked for lobbyists). Status filter (default active). Hidden from lobbyist sidebar.
routes./settings: Tabs: הודעות מערכת, הצעות ייעול (badge), אזורים.
routes./test/whatsapp: Sidebar-visible to all lobbyists. CHAT-STYLE UI as of Session 7: top status bar (status chip + connected user + Connect/Disconnect) | error banner | split panel: ConversationSidebar (right side in RTL, one row per phone with last-message preview + apartment + time) + ChatPanel (chat header with editable phone field + selected resident name | RTL-correct bubbles with status ticks | composer = wrapped textarea + ghost send button with brand-red icon flipped via -scale-x-100). Polling every 2s pulls status + active-conversation messages + conversation list together. Route still under /test/* — rename to /whatsapp when spike-naming officially graduates.

whatsapp_state.status: Full chat UI shipped Session 7. Outbound sends are persisted with status tracking (pending→sent→delivered→read or failed). Inbound listener is wired but UNTESTED — Moti will smoke-test in a few hours with a second phone. NOTHING in the app auto-triggers a send yet — manual chat composer is still the only send path.
whatsapp_state.runtime: src/lib/whatsapp-test.ts — WhatsAppTestRuntime singleton on globalThis.__raamWhatsAppTest. Auth persisted at .baileys-auth/test-whatsapp/ (gitignored, per-machine). NEW IN SESSION 7: sendText wraps the Baileys send in pending→sent/failed DB updates capturing wa_message_id for receipt correlation. messages.upsert listener records inbound rows (filters fromMe + non-1:1 chats) using extractText that unwraps ephemeralMessage / viewOnceMessage(V2) / image+video captions. messages.update listener flips status forward with a guard (never downgrades from read or failed). Diagnostic console.logs LEFT IN PLACE on the upsert listener — Moti can tail .next/dev/logs/next-development.log when testing inbound.
whatsapp_state.api_routes: src/app/api/test/whatsapp/{connect,status,send,logout}/route.ts — thin Response.json wrappers, runtime=nodejs, no auth gate (proxy excludes /api/*). Status polled every 2s from the client alongside server actions for messages + conversations.
whatsapp_state.server_actions: src/app/test/whatsapp/actions.ts — getWhatsAppMessages({residentId, phone}) (OR-merges both filters), getWhatsAppConversations() (CTE last-per-phone with residents/apartments/zones join returning SelectedResident-shaped resident or null).
whatsapp_state.phone_normalization: normalizePhoneOrNull exported from whatsapp-test.ts — returns digits-only with 972 prefix if input was 0xx-style, null if empty. Resident matching uses last-9-digit compare for robustness across formats.
known_bugs_in_runtime_NOT_FIXED: BUG 1 — logout() can hang. `await this.socket?.logout()` has no timeout. If the underlying WebSocket is degraded the protocol logout never acks and the await sits forever. The `finally` block is guarded by that await, so `fs.rm(AUTH_DIR)` never runs. Symptom: stale creds persist on disk; next connect hits the server with dead creds and the server returns `{reason:401, location:'cln'}` or `{reason:401, location:'atn'}` — Moti hit the 'atn' variant this session. Manual unblock: `rm -rf .baileys-auth/test-whatsapp`.

BUG 2 — listeners stay attached during/after wipe. Even when fs.rm runs, the socket's `creds.update` listener (saveCreds) and Baileys' internal key-store I/O can write fresh files into the just-wiped folder. Net effect: stale files can resurrect post-wipe.

FIX SKETCH (not applied yet, deferred A THIRD TIME): grab a local `socket` reference, immediately null `this.socket` + reset state, race `socket.logout()` against a 3s timeout, call `socket.end()`, remove all listeners (`socket.ev.removeAllListeners?.()` or equivalent), THEN await `fs.rm(AUTH_DIR, ...)`.
decision_log_session_7: Chat UI scope: persist outbound, log inbound, status tracking — all in one session. Confirmed by Moti decision matrix at session start.

ConversationSidebar derived from whatsapp_messages table, NOT from Baileys' chats.* events (Path B). Reason: matches lobby UX (staff sees only conversations the app has touched), zero extra event wiring, single SQL query.
Logout-hang fix DEFERRED A THIRD TIME — kept session 7 PR tight. Should be Session 8's first move BEFORE any auto-triggered send wiring lands.
Diagnostic console.logs in messages.upsert listener LEFT IN PLACE for next-session inbound smoke-testing. Remove once inbound is confirmed working.
Send icon flipped via -scale-x-100 (not rtl: variant) — app is RTL-only, the simpler class is enough.
whatsapp_state.session_7_test_gap: Inbound flow could not be exercised — Moti had no second phone available. Will smoke-test later today. Console logs are in place. Most likely failure mode if inbound silently doesn't work: stale runtime singleton on globalThis (full `next dev` restart fixes); secondary: extractText misses a wrapper Baileys delivers (the diagnostic log will show which key).

ConversationSidebar with per-phone last-message preview. Chat composer with wrapped border + ghost send button + RTL-flipped icon. Stale Baileys creds bit again (manual rm unblock). New src/lib/dashboard-queries.ts + src/components/dashboard/ (8 files: ChartCard + 7 tiles). Session 12 (2026-06-04): Committed the entire ~4-session backlog into 6 schema-first commits (owners, equipment loans, SLPR cars tab + per-row register-guest button, dashboard tweaks, tooling) and pushed. Then shipped guest recognition: resident_guests plate-keyed learning table (learn-on-create INSERT OR IGNORE, recognize-on-display via app-level join between external SLPR MySQL and local SQLite), src/lib/plate.ts normalizePlate, green 'אורח מזוהה' column + details highlight, removed מצלמה/לקוח columns, compact DD/MM HH:MM date (full on hover), guest-NAME prefill on register, and a forget-guest control (forgetResidentGuest + DeleteEventButton). 9 commits, HEAD 51dbda0, all pushed, tree clean.

Session 13 (2026-06-05, from 2026-06-04 eve): (a) אורחים מוכרים tab in /events — paginated+searchable list of resident_guests (getKnownGuestsPage/searchKnownGuests, KnownGuestsTab.tsx). (b) READ-ONLY research dive into the SLPR parking MySQL: mapped all 33 tables, established it's a plate-at-gate system with NO per-spot/occupancy data, broken/saturated occupancy counters, exit cam off; customer table = 376 cars (160 emp/216 res). (c) רכבים רשומים tab in /settings — read-only customer directory with composition donut + escaped search (registered-cars-actions.ts + RegisteredCarsTab.tsx). (d) cars-tab אורח מזוהה column now falls back to the customer table (LEFT JOIN on Customer_Id) showing the registered owner in sky-blue 'רכב רשום' when not a learned guest. (e) per-plate deduped visit count badge + history panel in cars tab (familiarity signal for unregistered cars, Moti's insight). 5 feature commits (95ce453, ecb2bd2, adb77f1, 9e8ba13 + bookkeeping), HEAD 9e8ba13, all pushed, tree clean.
